full_text:
Cheng Yin 程銀
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cheng Yin (程銀)was born in Hedong. One of Han Sui’s Eight Knights. Died fighting Cao Cao at Wei Nan. Cheng Yin was affiliated with the Han Sui Dynasty, Zhang Lu, and the Wei Kingdom. Cheng Yin lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
